text.title: vui-conversation-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vui-conversation-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Disambiguation with more than one clarifying turn before falling back to directed prompt or human.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Multi-turn disambiguation compounds confusion. After one failed disambiguation, transition to a directed prompt with explicit options or escalate to human assistance.

failure-mode.description: Using option prompts with more than 4 choices (e.g., listing 7 options).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Voice working memory holds 3-4 items. Users lose track of options mid-list and cannot re-hear. Constrain options to 4 or fewer, or use directed prompting to narrow the space.

failure-mode.description: Breaking the user's mental model on barge-in by ignoring a relevant interruption mid-prompt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If the user starts speaking during a prompt with a relevant utterance and the system ignores it, trust breaks immediately. Accept relevant barge-in; if irrelevant, gracefully resume.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated unbounded paraphrases used as runtime prompt variants.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Runtime LLM paraphrases drift in tone and length across sessions. Pre-generate 3-5 vetted variants offline and rotate. Never generate prompt copy live in production.

failure-mode.description: LLM dialog flow skips no-input and max-retry transitions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs reliably omit timeout and escalation transitions. Run repair-coverage-checker on every draft before review — treat missing transitions as blocking defects.

failure-mode.description: Using the same TTS engine for test fixtures as for product output.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Same-vendor TTS inflates naturalness scores in LLM-judge evaluation. Use a different TTS engine for test utterance fixtures than for product output rendering.
